##: cargo-dist does NOT generate Scoop manifests (DEC-14), so this file is
maintained by hand and bumped mechanically by the release workflow's
stanza makes bumps mechanical: `version`, the download `url`, and `hash`
(fetched from the artifact's .sha256) are the only fields that change.
`version`/`hash` below are pre-release placeholders — the first real tag
(08-08) fills them via the bump step. Only x86_64 Windows is a release
target; aarch64-pc-windows-msvc is best-effort and not shipped via Scoop.
description: verify, secure, and ship AI-generated code — one binary, runs locally, nothing leaves your machine
